subject: Toxel, a small baby-like Pokemon with a purple body and a sac on its belly, sitting in a grassy outdoor setting
description: A small purple creature with a rounded baby-like body sits in lush green grass surrounded by flowers. The creature has a smooth rounded head with small eyes and a neutral expression, short stubby arms, and a visible pouch or sac on its front torso. Bright yellow flowers and green vegetation fill the foreground and background, creating a cheerful natural scene. The sky visible behind shows light cloud and warm tones. Despite the vibrant natural setting, the creature itself looks mildly dazed or placid.
foreground: small purple round-bodied baby creature with belly sac sitting among yellow flowers and green grass
background: lush green field with yellow flowers and bright sky
emotion: mildly dazed and placid; the baby posture reads as content and unaware
